tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India [Lending
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India [Lending'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India [Lending
